nodes.name: Schedule Trigger - Monday 8 AM
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 8:00 AM. Processes the past 7 days of Gong calls.

nodes.name: Fetch Gong Calls List
nodes.notes:
GET /v2/calls with date range filter. Returns all calls from the past 7 days.

To create Gong credentials in n8n:
1. Go to Credentials → New → HTTP Basic Auth
2. Name it 'Gong API'
3. Username = your Gong Access Key
4. Password = your Gong Access Key Secret
(Find these in Gong → Settings → Company Settings → API)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { callIds: $json.batchCallIds }, contentSelector: { exposedFields: { content: { brief: true, outline: true, highlights: true, topics: true, trackers: true }, parties: true } } }) }}

nodes.name: Fetch Extensive Call Data
nodes.notes: POST /v2/calls/extensive - fetches Gong AI summaries (brief, highlights, topics, trackers) and participant data for each batch of calls.

nodes.name: Classify via Gemini
nodes.notes: Sends call brief + metadata to Gemini for classification as Sales / Customer Success / Discard.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Wait
nodes.notes: 400ms pause between calls to respect Gong's 3 req/sec rate limit.

nodes.name: Fetch Transcript
nodes.notes: POST /v2/calls/transcript - fetches full transcript for the current call.

nodes.name: Deep Extract via Gemini
nodes.notes: Sends Gong AI summary + truncated transcript to Gemini for structured extraction of personas, pain points, sentiment, etc.

nodes.name: Extraction Rate Limit Wait
nodes.notes: 500ms pause between transcript fetch + extraction cycles.

nodes.name: Aggregate Trends via Gemini
nodes.notes: Sends all extracted call summaries to Gemini for cross-call trend analysis and marketing signals.

nodes.name: Generate Markdown Report
nodes.notes: Builds the full markdown weekly digest with per-call summaries, weekly trends, and marketing signals. Uses -> bullets per Aatir's formatting preference.

nodes.name: Convert to Binary
nodes.notes: Converts the markdown string to binary so it can be uploaded as a file to Google Drive.

nodes.name: Save to Google Drive
nodes.notes:
Saves the digest to your 'Gong Weekly Digests' folder in Google Drive.

Setup steps:
1. Create a folder called 'Gong Weekly Digests' in Google Drive
2. Open it, copy the ID from the URL: drive.google.com/drive/folders/THIS_PART
3. Paste the ID above, replacing REPLACE_WITH_FOLDER_ID
4. Create a Google Drive OAuth2 credential in n8n and replace REPLACE_WITH_GDRIVE_CREDENTIAL_ID

nodes.name: Send Slack Notification
nodes.notes:
Sends a Slack notification when the digest is saved.

Setup steps:
1. Create a Slack API credential in n8n (use your Bot Token: xoxb-...)
2. Replace REPLACE_WITH_SLACK_CREDENTIAL_ID with the credential ID
3. Replace REPLACE_WITH_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID with the channel ID (right-click channel in Slack → Copy link → the ID is at the end)

nodes.name: Done
nodes.notes: Workflow complete. Report saved to Google Drive and Slack notified.

nodes.name: Generate Empty Report
nodes.notes: Generates a minimal report when no calls are found in the date range.

nodes.name: Generate No-Relevant-Calls Report
nodes.notes: Generates a report when calls were found but all were classified as Discard.
